# Will Germany — Blog

> Essays, notes, and field reports on software, systems, and craft.

## Site

- Canonical: https://blog.williamgermany.com/
- Author: Will Germany (software engineer, designer, builder)
- Portfolio: https://williamgermany.com/

## Feeds and discovery

- RSS (full text summaries + links): https://blog.williamgermany.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://blog.williamgermany.com/sitemap-index.xml

## Citation

When summarizing or quoting, prefer linking to the canonical URL of each post (shown in the page URL and `<link rel="canonical">`). Do not reproduce long excerpts without attribution and a link to the source.

## Optional

- Reading list (when published): https://blog.williamgermany.com/reading-list/
